scripts.render: rimraf node_modules/.cache && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider remotion render
scripts.render:hd: rimraf node_modules/.cache && cross-env RESOLUTION_WIDTH=720 RESOLUTION_HEIGHT=1280 NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider remotion render
scripts.render:fullhd: rimraf node_modules/.cache && cross-env RESOLUTION_WIDTH=1080 RESOLUTION_HEIGHT=1920 NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider remotion render
scripts.render:2k: rimraf node_modules/.cache && cross-env RESOLUTION_WIDTH=1440 RESOLUTION_HEIGHT=2560 NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider remotion render
scripts.render:4k: rimraf node_modules/.cache && cross-env RESOLUTION_WIDTH=2160 RESOLUTION_HEIGHT=3840 NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider remotion render
